subcodes.first_line: This is an Epistle from the Prisoner unto the handmaidens of God, that they may remember God at morn and eventide and stand firm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المسجون الی اماء الله لیذکرن الله فی کل بکور و اصیلا و یستقمن
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for women, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
